calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Ruth Auerbach, Esq. for Plaintiff: Suzanne Tucker, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Thomas R. Carlson ind. and fdba One Stop Graphics & Printing; and One Stop Graphics & Printing, Inc., a Corporation as follows: Money Judgment,
Principal of $54,738.00,
Interest $17,205.00
Attorney's fees according to proof.
Costs of $281.00.
Money judgment may not be enforced as against defendant Thomas R. Carlson, individually, due to the discharge entered in his Chapter 7 Bankruptcy case.
Judgment for possession of the collateral described in Exh. "A".
Defendants Thomas R. Carlson, ind. and fdba One Stop Graphics & Printing; and One Stop Graphics & Printing, Inc., a Corporation are hereby permanently enjoined from using the intellectual property which is subject to the security interest of Plaintiff, including, but not limited to, the name, One Stop Graphics, the telephone number, fax number and web site, as described as items 1 through 4 on Exh. "A".
Judgment signed in open court.
